info.english_meaning: to desire to long for to wish

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'annapAnaM prakANkzati' (suSruta॰1.52.6) viSezeRecCati varDete asyASanAyApipAse ityarTaH
'yaTA mfgapatirnityaM prakANkzati vanOkasaH' (BA॰SAM॰116.23)
'tadasya muKavESadyaM prakANkzAM cAnnapAnayoH' (caraka0 ci0 3156) prakANkzA prakfzwA''kANkzA
'sa vikANkzan BfSaM rAmam' (rA0 3461) anicCannityarTa iti govindarAjaH
'kEkeyyAH priyakAmArTaM tadavikANkzayA' (rA0 25224) aviSaNkayeti wIkAkAro rAmaH paWati
'duHKopAyasya me vIra vikANkzA parivartate' (BA0 droRa0 8016) vikANkzA visaMvAdaH miTyAtvaM viroDaH vikANkzA vicAraRA'niScaya ityanye
'na me vikANkzA jAyeta tyaktuM tvAM pApaniScayAm' (rA0 27318) vikANkzA=icCA'BAvaH vicAraH
'pfzWamAroha me devi na vikANkzasva SoBane' (rA0 53726) na vikANkzasva=mA te vicAraRA BUt tARqyabrAhmaRe (6922) vikANkzatiH pratIkzaRe prayuktaH
'vyutTAnaM vikANkzadBiH kaTABiH pratiloByate' (BA0 SAM0 1143) vikANkzadBiraBIcCadBiH
'kEkeyyAH priyakAmArTaM kAryaM tadavikANkzayA' (rA0 25224) idaM pustake DftapUrvamihArTAntaranyAsAya punarDriyate vikANkzA'nAdara iti BUzaRam
'yo me kftastvayA kAlastamAkANkze jagatpate' (BA0 u0 159) pratIkza ityarTaH
' aNga paca aNgayukte tiNAkANkzam' (pA0 8296) ityatra pratyudAharaRaM vfttikAraDftam pratyudAharaRaM spazwayannAha nEtadaparamAkANkzati (tiNantam) iti AkANkzati apekzate'rTakArtsnyAya
'pratyASvasantaM ripumAcakANkza' (raGu0 747) AcakANkza pratIkzAYcake
'yAtrArTI kAlamAkANkzaMScared BEkzaM samAhitaH' (BA0 ASva0 4621) AkANkzan pratIkzamARaH
'dakziRAM diSamAkANkzan yAcetemAn varAn pitFn' (manu0 3258) dakziRadiSamaBimuKIBUtaH tAM vIkzamARa iti tAtparyam
'asatyAmAkANkzAyAM sanniDAnamakAraRam' (6423 mI0 SA0 BA0) AkANkzA'pekzA
'DarmavivAhAtkumArI parigrahItAramanAKyAya prozitamaSrUyamARaM sapta tIrTAnyAkANkzet' (kO0 a0 3431) AkANkzet pratIkzeta tIrTamArtavakAlaH
'tUzRIM vE Sreyasa AkANkzante' (E0 brA0 712) SrezWAnrAjagurvAdIn Agatya svABIzwaM prArTayante
'nAtyarTamaBikANkzAmi mfgayAM sarayUvane' (rA0 24915) aBikANkzAmi kANkzAmi icCAmi
'mfgaM haririvAdfSyaH pratyAkANkzata kIcakam' (BA0 vi0 2238) pratyAkANkzata=pratyAkANkzat pratyapAlayat pratyEkzata
parikANkzitaH parityaktEzaRo yatirBavati

prayoga.literature_text: yo na hfzyati na dvezwi na Socati na kANkzati
